rationale: The cited paper appears as one entry in a broad literature review table summarizing prior findings on service digitization, where it is used to exemplify that customized communications can reduce information overload in retail settings. The citing article does not build its hypotheses, empirical strategy, measures, or mechanisms specifically on this paper, nor does it engage with it in sustained text discussion. Its role is background positioning within a grouped set of prior studies rather than a paper-specific intellectual dependency.
